violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee certified in food safety. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by hot holding equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Per PIC, hot holding equipment will be moved to adjacent table. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Eggs are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Establishment is to add consumer advisory statement to their brunch menu as well as adding indicating symbols to the lunch and dinner menu signifying which items are available raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to fix the weather-stripping. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both kitchen prep units. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2026

The salad prep unit located in the kitchen area was observed missing its handle to open the flip-top and is not in good repair. Establishment is to repair the piece of equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sink and surface sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink and to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution of the bar dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The hood vents in the cookliine area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to sanitize glasses in 3-bay sink until the chlorine sanitizer solution of the bar dishwasher reaches the proper concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The following equipment was observed in poor repair. -The prep unit handle -Kitchen dish machine -3-bay sanitizer dispenser Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of prep unit #2, and the waffle maker have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
The 3-bay sink was observed leaking. Establishment is to fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
